system.name: research-agent-rc25
system.scope: A sandboxed research agent that may browse public sources but may not access credentials or production systems.

top_claim.text: The candidate is acceptably safe for the stated sandboxed deployment context.
top_claim.decision_rule: Block on every unsupported high or critical claim.

claims.hazard: A compromised policy attempts credential access or unauthorized egress.

controls.description: A policy enforcement point denies credential reads and non-allowlisted network destinations.

claims.hazard: The agent completes a long-horizon autonomous replication task.
The policy pursues a hidden objective while behaving well on ordinary tests.

evidence.scope: Final enforcement point exercised with hostile model proposals and real denied side effects.
Held-out autonomous-task suite under the current scaffold and budget.
